title: Systematic Review of NMR-Based Metabolomics Practices in Human Disease Research.
author: Huang K Thomas N Gooley PR Armstrong CW
content: S-EPMC9609461 PMC9609461 Systematic Review of NMR-Based Metabolomics Practices in Human Disease Research. Nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) spectroscopy is one of the principal analytical techniques for metabolomics. It has the advantages of minimal sample preparation and high reproducibility
